main.description: Record representing a domain registered through Marque. The record key is the fully qualified domain name (e.g. example.com).

atprotoHandle.description: AT Protocol handle set on this domain, if any.

atprotoVerified.description: Whether the atproto handle has been verified via DNS.

autoRenew.description: Whether the domain renews automatically before it expires.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this record was created.

domain.description: Fully qualified domain name, e.g. example.com.

nameServers.description: Authoritative name servers for this domain.

registeredAt.description: When the domain was registered with the upstream registrar.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the domain.

whoisPrivacy.description: WHOIS privacy status: on, off, gdpr (for TLDs with mandated data protection), or registry (for TLDs where the registry redacts WHOIS data by default).

description: A domain registration managed by Marque. Stored in the user's repository.
